title: Gage R&R Cost Analysis
description: Calculates the total cost of measurement system variation (repeatability and reproducibility) based on MSA studies, including hidden losses and confidence-adjusted estimates.

inputs.label: Number of Parts in Study
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct parts selected for the Gage R&R study, typically 5-20 per AIAG MSA guidelines.

inputs.label: Number of Appraisers
inputs.businessContext: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operators or appraisers performing measurements, minimum 2 for reproducibility estimation.

inputs.label: Number of Trials per Part
inputs.businessContext: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repeated measurements per part per appraiser, typically 2-3.

inputs.label: Total Observed Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of all measurements in the study, representing total process variation.

inputs.label: Repeatability Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to equipment (same operator, same part, repeated measurements).

inputs.label: Reproducibility Variation (Std Dev)
inputs.businessContext: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

businessContext_i18n.en: Variation due to different operators measuring the same part.

inputs.label: Cost per Defect (Internal)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost incurred when a non-conforming unit is detected internally (scrap, rework, inspection).

inputs.label: Cost per Escaped Defect (External)
inputs.businessContext: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost when a defect reaches the customer (warranty, liability, lost sales).

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced per year for the measured characteristic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced per year for the measured characteristic.

inputs.label: Current Defect Rate (ppm)
inputs.businessContext: Parts per million non-conforming based on current measurement system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Parts per million non-conforming based on current measurement system.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Losses (False Positives/Negatives)
inputs.businessContext: If true, calculates costs from misclassifications due to measurement error.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, calculates costs from misclassifications due to measurement error.

rules.message: Sum of repeatability and reproducibility variation must not exceed total observed variation.
Number of parts must be at least 2.
Number of appraisers must be at least 2.
Number of trials must be at least 2.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 1,000,000 ppm.

thresholds.label: %GRR Threshold
thresholds.message: %GRR exceeds 30% — measurement system is unacceptable per AIAG guidelines.

thresholds.label: Number of Distinct Categories (ndc) Threshold
thresholds.message: ndc is less than 5 — measurement system cannot adequately distinguish between parts.

thresholds.label: Annual Cost Impact Threshold
thresholds.message: Annual cost from measurement error exceeds $50,000 — immediate action recommended.

formulas.name: Gage R&R Variation
formulas.description: Combined repeatability and reproducibility variation (pooled standard deviation).

formulas.name: %GRR (Percent Gage R&R)
formulas.description: Percentage of total variation consumed by measurement system error.

formulas.name: Number of Distinct Categories
formulas.description: Number of distinct part categories the measurement system can reliably distinguish.

formulas.name: Misclassification Rate
formulas.description: Estimated rate of false positives and false negatives due to measurement error (based on GRR and defect rate).

formulas.name: Annual Internal Failure Cost
formulas.description: Cost of defects detected internally (scrap, rework).

formulas.name: Annual External Failure Cost
formulas.description: Cost of defects that escape to the customer.

formulas.name: Annual Hidden Loss Cost (Misclassification)
formulas.description: Additional cost from false positives/negatives due to measurement error.

formulas.name: Total Annual Cost of Measurement Error
formulas.description: Primary result: sum of all failure costs and hidden losses.

primary.label: Total Annual Cost of Measurement Error
primary.description: Primary result: total annual cost attributable to measurement system variation.

components.label: External Failure Cost
components.description: Cost of defects that reach the customer.

components.label: Hidden Loss Cost (Misclassification)
components.description: Cost from false positives/negatives due to measurement error.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: %GRR
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: High %GRR increases misclassification rates and hidden costs.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Number of Distinct Categories
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Low ndc reduces ability to detect process shifts, increasing risk.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Gage Repeatability
suggestedActions.description: Calibrate or replace measurement equipment to reduce repeatability variation.

suggestedActions.label: Standardize Measurement Procedure
suggestedActions.description: Provide training and clear work instructions to reduce reproducibility variation.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Number of Distinct Categories
suggestedActions.description: Use a more precise measurement system or increase part range in study.

suggestedActions.label: Review Tolerances and Specifications
suggestedActions.description: Ensure measurement system is adequate for tolerance (P/T ratio).

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Total Cost
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total cost adjusted for measurement system uncertainty (95% confidence interval upper bound).
